creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Check out these amazing boat rides in Dubai!

💙 @blackpearl.dxb 
All aboard the Pirate Ship! If you’ve seen this odd-looking ship in the waters of Dubai, don’t be scared! Black Pearl is a sightseeing boat cruising from Dubai Creek Harbour and back.

💙 @heroboattours 
This is the most exhilarating water activity we’ve tried. Hero OdySea is Dubai’s first self-drive boat tour! Cruise in the Arabian Gulf and see Dubai’s amazing skyline from a unique perspective.

💙 @dreamsboats 
Level up your coffee/tea date with Dreams Boats! Sail for 45 minutes in a private Floating Café. Relax with Arabic coffee, tea, and cold drinks.  Enjoy light bites, dates, nuts, and chips. 

💙 @cc.watersports crystal clear boat
Have a unique water adventure in this transparent boat! It’s an electric boat with a captain, so you can just sit back, relax, enjoy the coastline and Burj Khalifa views.

💙 @costaazzurra.ae 
Costa Azzurra is a unique and relaxing boating experience. It is a self-drive electric catamaran for two; a perfect activity for couples! 

💰 Please contact respective boat operators for current rates and schedule.

Tag your adventure buddies!
